name: Keith Copeland
abstract: Keith Copeland (born in New York City on April 18, 1946, died in Germany on February 14, 2015) was a jazz drummer and music educator.

concerts.label: Kool Jazz Festival: A Tribute to Wes Montgomery
Kinetics: Jazz Compositions by Walter Lee

about_quotes.speaker: David N. Baker
about_quotes.evidence: We’re in a quintet which consisted of Joe Kennedy and myself – two string players – Larry Ridley, Keith Copeland on drums, and Russell Wilson on piano, which we had together for about two years.
about_quotes.doc_title: David N. Baker — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Louie Bellson
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] That’s who – I studied with a student of Alan Dawson: Copeland – Keith Copeland. ... [INTERVIEWEE] That’s right.
about_quotes.doc_title: Louie Bellson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
